changes: Technical design complete: one canonical module narrative, 9 accepted decisions, 8 data models, 4 feature areas, and 5 diagrams; selected five typed BUDGET operations plus shared discovery, separate owner-only raw SQLite, immutable revision payloads with atomic lifecycle events, event-time idempotent replay, trusted period time, released LEDGER category/actuals composition with inclusive-date mapping, pure exhaustive exact position calculation, read-only INSIGHTS capability projection, explicit CORE compliance and CHANNELS UI boundary; fresh graph-only review corrected selector-period validation, archived-category bucketing, mutation/read DTO separation, actor ownership, and checked arithmetic; coverage healthy with greenfield paths and four assumed external contracts retained as planning gates.
